hermit.greeting: Ah, a brave soul enters the dungeon. I've been trapped here for years...

options.response: This dungeon has three floors. Each is guarded by a powerful boss. Defeat them all to escape. But beware the ticking clock - the bosses grow stronger with each room you enter.
Take this potion. You'll need it more than I will.

options.text: Can you teach me a spell?
options.response: I know the Healing Light spell. Focus your mana and let the light flow through you.
Good luck, adventurer. You'll need it.
